lab_markers.name: High-Sensitivity C-Reactive Protein
lab_markers.description: Systemic inflammation marker. Elevated levels indicate acute or chronic inflammation.

lab_markers.name: Ferritin
lab_markers.description: Iron storage protein. Low levels impair oxygen transport and endurance performance.

lab_markers.name: Vitamin D (25-OH)
lab_markers.description: Critical for immune function, bone health, and muscle recovery. Deficiency increases injury risk.

lab_markers.name: Creatine Kinase
lab_markers.description: Muscle damage marker. Elevated post-exercise is normal; persistently high suggests inadequate recovery.

lab_markers.name: Cortisol (AM)
lab_markers.description: Stress hormone. Chronically elevated levels indicate overtraining or high life stress.

lab_markers.name: Iron
lab_markers.description: Essential for hemoglobin synthesis and oxygen transport.

lab_markers.name: Total Iron Binding Capacity
lab_markers.description: Measures blood's capacity to bind iron. High TIBC suggests iron deficiency.

lab_markers.name: Interleukin-6
lab_markers.description: Pro-inflammatory cytokine. Acute elevation from exercise is normal; chronic elevation indicates systemic inflammation.

lab_markers.name: Tumor Necrosis Factor Alpha
lab_markers.description: Pro-inflammatory cytokine involved in systemic inflammation.

lab_markers.name: Erythrocyte Sedimentation Rate
lab_markers.description: Non-specific inflammation marker. Elevated in infection, tissue damage, or chronic inflammation.

lab_markers.name: Homocysteine
lab_markers.description: Cardiovascular risk and B-vitamin status marker.

wearable_proxies.name: HRV Depression
wearable_proxies.description: HRV significantly below personal baseline indicates autonomic stress/inflammation.

wearable_proxies.name: RHR Elevation
wearable_proxies.description: Resting heart rate above baseline suggests systemic stress or illness.

wearable_proxies.name: Respiratory Rate Elevation
wearable_proxies.description: Elevated respiratory rate during sleep indicates respiratory or systemic stress.

wearable_proxies.name: Skin Temperature Deviation
wearable_proxies.description: Significant skin temperature deviation from baseline may indicate illness onset.

wearable_proxies.name: Sleep Disruption
wearable_proxies.description: Poor sleep quality and frequent awakenings impair immune function and recovery.
